title: Some other one
description:
Eligibility for all selected plan(s)

Important eligibility information:

Premium Protection Plan for Primary traveller

You are not eligible for this insurance if any of the following apply to you or anyone you want to cover:

  • Over age 74
  • Do not reside in Canada
  • Travelling for more than 45 days
  • Not covered under a government health insurance plan (GHIP) for the entire duration of your trip
  • Made the initial payment for your trip travel arrangements more than 72 hours from the time of purchasing this plan

If any of these statements apply to you or anyone you want to cover, you are not eligible for this insurance then remove any travellers who are not eligible for coverage.
